Interface ITimeExtent

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the Time Extent.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("BD724B95-018F-4367-9883-9560D92293A7")]
public interface ITimeExtent : ITimeValue

Empty

Indicates whether the time extent is empty.

bool Empty { get; set; }

bool
